items.title: Possibility to attach/upload e-mails to conversation updates bubble
items.excerpt: It would be great to have a chance to upload e-mails into the conversation updates bubble and have them displayed there directly (like a PDF).

items.title: Export Doc in a PDF format that can be open in Word
items.excerpt:
Hello, 
When opening a PDF file generated from a monday workdoc with Word, the content is displayed as blocks of images. 
It would be great if it could be in a PDF format that can be edited with Word 
Thanks

items.title: New Feature: See all bell Notifications
items.excerpt: Instead of having to scroll through and delete bell notifications one by one, be able to open the notifications up as a page (the same as inbox) and mass select notifications to either read / delete them.

items.title: Number columns drop the trailing zero on currency
items.excerpt: Am I wrong? Does the number column really drop the trailing zero from currency amounts.  It changes $543.20 to $543.2.  It does this on every currency field and the formulas using them.

items.title: Sync People, Phone and Email Columns
items.excerpt: Request to enable linking of Phone and Email columns with a People column such that a change in the People column will reflect as a change to the phone number and email displayed in the linked columns.

items.title: Make "Set Board Defaults" to apply to New Boards, not just new columns
AverageIF, DivideIF options in formulas to avoid nulls/zeros being included
items.excerpt: Currently in Monday formulas there is no formulas such as: AverageIF or DivideIF or MultiplyIF, so that you can avoid using null or 0 in your number based equations. This is important when using columns like “rating” and…

items.title: Admins should be able to view which external apps/integrations are in account
items.excerpt: Admins should be able to view which external tools are integrated with their account, and what boards have active integrations in one place.

items.title: Save deleted subitem columns in trash for easy recovery
items.excerpt: Subitem columns should be saved in trash just like item columns for easy recovery. I had a client delete a critical subitem column which impacted numerous dashboards and had no way to recover it.

items.title: Workdoc tables should allow you to highlight & copy or format them all at once
items.excerpt: Each line in a table must be highlighted and formatted/copied one at a time. We need the ability to select multiple rows or cells at a time to format or copy.

items.title: We need an easy way to exclude zeros or nulls from widgets
items.excerpt: It would be great if there was an easy way to remove zeros or nulls from widgets/dashboards, etc. Zeros and nulls can skew results when they should just be skipped.

items.title: Meta data or tags for columns to use with filters
items.excerpt: There is currently no way to filter by multiple columns at once with something such as a column tag. This feature would be especially useful for complex formulas or graph widgets, with use cases such as ratings collected…

items.title: Need a meaningful way to display "Rating" results from forms
items.excerpt: Please add a widget that will display rating results in a meaningful way. Currently it takes General Castor to convert ratings into a score/number in order to display results on a widget.

items.title: Ability to use Keyboard Shortcuts to post an item update
items.excerpt: Hello, I would like to suggest a Keyboard Shortcut enhancement. After I finish typing out my message/update it would be nice to post that message with a quick keyboard shortcut. Shift + Enter seems to make the most sense…
